hero.title: AI on the Streets
hero.subtitle: Smarter Signals, Smarter People
hero.tagline: Teaching the Next Generation How AI Can Improve Communities

highlights.title: Interactive AI Simulation
highlights.description: Students control a live 4-way intersection comparing fixed timers vs. sensor-based vs. AI-adaptive signals — based on real Python simulations.

highlights.title: Cybersecurity Awareness
highlights.description: Hands-on quizzes and real-world examples teach students why smart cities need strong digital defenses.

highlights.title: STEM Career Pathways
highlights.description: Resources connecting students to AI, transportation engineering, and cybersecurity career opportunities.
